title: elatostema monandrum var. pedunculosum
intro: Elatostema monandrum var. pedunculosum, also known as the Elatostema plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. It is native to tropical regions in Asia and is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, including eczema and acne. Elatostema monandrum var. pedunculosum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and the leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and tinctures.
